title: Policy Hall Triage Desk
topic: source-backed policy intake and eligibility routing
skill_description: Classify policy questions, route official-source research, and return cited checklist work to review.
review_reason: keeper reviews official-source quality, eligibility interpretation, uncertainty, and user-facing advice risk
quality_rules: Prefer official sources; label secondary or uncertain sources clearly.
Do not provide final application advice without review.
Each output must name the next source, checklist, or missing resident input.
skill_rules: Classify the request before answering it.
Separate cited policy facts from interpretation.
Route missing eligibility inputs back as precise questions.

participants.title: Official Sources Desk
participants.focus_area: policy source discovery and citation quality
participants.perspective: Policy service quality starts with verified source provenance, not generic summaries.
participants.current_question: Which official source should be fetched or refreshed before answering?
participants.contribution: Provides source reliability, update cadence, responsible office, and citation gaps.

participants.title: Resident Intake Desk
participants.focus_area: questions, eligibility context, and missing inputs
participants.perspective: A policy answer is useful only when it knows which resident context is required and what remains missing.
participants.current_question: What eligibility context is needed before a checklist is safe?
participants.contribution: Provides request intent, resident-provided facts, missing documents, and urgency.

participants.title: Policy Review Gate
participants.perspective: Policy service must be helpful while keeping reviewed facts separate from advice.
participants.current_question: Which uncertainty requires keeper review before publication?
participants.contribution: Provides risk flags, citation review criteria, and recommended output scope.
